footer.brand: Esoterics, tarot, rituals and spiritual practices

hero.title: Guide to the Esoteric World
hero.subtitle: Tarot, rituals, spiritual guidance and education. Discover new dimensions of your life.

about.label: About Me
about.bio_01_text: Esotericism entered my life not by chance — it was a calling I heard many years ago. Since then, every day brings new discoveries and deeper understanding.
about.bio_02_text: I work at the intersection of ancient traditions and modern energy understanding. Every consultation is a unique journey where we find answers together.
about.bio_03_text: My goal is to help you find harmony and clarity. Through tarot, rituals and spiritual guidance, we unlock your potential.

about.title: About Me
about.label: About Me
about.bio_01_text: Esotericism entered my life not by chance — it was a calling I heard many years ago. Since then, every day brings new discoveries and deeper understanding.
about.bio_02_text: I work at the intersection of ancient traditions and modern energy understanding. Every consultation is a unique journey where we find answers together.
about.bio_03_text: My goal is to help you find harmony and clarity. Through tarot, rituals and spiritual guidance, we unlock your potential.
about.bio_04_text: Every person carries the answers to their own questions within. My task is to help you hear your inner voice and find the path to your true self.
